title: Create: Crimsite Recipe
description: Create Add-on That Adds Recipe For Crimsite. Allowing Players To Renewable Get Iron.
body: ## 🌱 About Create: Crimsite Recipe is an add-on for the Create mod, available as both a mod and a datapack. It introduces a new recipe for Crimsite, allowing players to renewably get Crimsite and by processing it with Crushing Wheels, gain a renewable source of iron. ## 📋 Recipe Use [Just Enough Items(JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To View The Recipe In-Game ![Compacting: 1x Gravel + 3x Flint + 50mb of Lava Yields 1x Crimsite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/359af49a99fddbf0cbdfc76c19df029352b27de0.png) ## 🧩 Installation Guide **How to Install the Mod (.jar)** 1. Download the Mod: Get the .jar file. 2. Drop the File: Drag the downloaded .jar file into the mods folder. **How to Install the Datapack (.zip)** 1. Download: Get the .zip file for the Datapack version. 2. Open Your World Folder: 3. Install: Open the datapacks folder and drag the downloaded .zip file inside. # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server? Check out Godlike Host!
